sentences.sentence: Artificial intelligence (AI) can already predict the future.
sentences.translation: 人工智能（AI）已经能够预测未来。
difficult_points: can already predict 中 already 强调 AI 的预测能力已经成为现实。
Artificial intelligence 后括号中的 AI 是缩写说明，后文可用 AI 指代。

sentences.sentence: Police forces are using it to map when and where crime is likely to occur.
sentences.translation: 警方正在利用它来绘制犯罪可能在何时何地发生的图示。

structure.text: to map when and where crime is likely to occur
when and where crime is likely to occur

difficult_points: it 指上一句的 Artificial intelligence (AI)。
to map 表示使用 AI 的目的。
when and where 引导嵌入内容，说明预测的是犯罪发生的时间和地点。

sentences.sentence: Doctors can use it to predict when a patient is most likely to have a heart attack or stroke.
sentences.translation: 医生可以用它来预测病人何时最有可能发生心脏病发作或中风。

structure.text: to predict when a patient is most likely to have a heart attack or stroke
when a patient is most likely to have a heart attack or stroke

difficult_points: it 继续指代 AI，说明医疗领域的应用。
most likely to 表示最高概率，而非确定会发生。
heart attack or stroke 是并列医学结果。

sentences.sentence: Researchers are even trying to give AI imagination so it can plan for unexpected consequences.
sentences.translation: 研究人员甚至正试图赋予 AI 想象力，以便它能够为意外后果提前做计划。

structure.text: are even trying to give AI imagination
so it can plan for unexpected consequences

difficult_points: are even trying 强调研究目标比一般预测更进一步。
give AI imagination 是拟人化表达，表示让 AI 具备设想情境的能力。
so 引导目的/结果从句，说明赋予想象力的用途。

sentences.sentence: Many decisions in our lives require a good forecast, and AI is almost always better at forecasting than we are.
sentences.translation: 我们生活中的许多决定都需要良好的预测，而 AI 几乎总是比我们更擅长预测。

structure.text: and AI is almost always better at forecasting than we are

difficult_points: and 连接两个完整分句，先说人类决策需求，再说 AI 优势。
better at forecasting than we are 中 than 从句省略了 better at forecasting。
almost always 表示高度频繁但不是绝对无例外。

sentences.sentence: Yet for all these technological advances, we still seem to deeply lack confidence in AI predictions.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管有所有这些技术进步，我们似乎仍然对 AI 的预测深深缺乏信心。

structure.text: still seem to deeply lack confidence in AI predictions

difficult_points: Yet 表示与前面 AI 预测能力形成转折。
for all these technological advances 表示“尽管有这些进步”，不是目的。
seem to lack confidence 表示观察到的倾向，而非直接断言所有人都不信任。

sentences.sentence: Recent cases show that people don't like relying on AI and prefer to trust human experts, even if these experts are wrong.
sentences.translation: 近期案例显示，人们不喜欢依赖 AI，而更愿意信任人类专家，即使这些专家是错的。

structure.text: that people don't like relying on AI and prefer to trust human experts
even if these experts are wrong

difficult_points: show 后接 that 宾语从句，说明案例揭示的现象。
don't like relying on AI 和 prefer to trust human experts 是并列倾向。
even if 引导让步从句，突出对人类专家的偏好不一定基于准确性。

sentences.sentence: If we want AI to really benefit people, we need to find a way to get people to trust it.
sentences.translation: 如果我们希望 AI 真正造福人们，就需要找到一种让人们信任它的方法。

structure.text: If we want AI to really benefit people
to get people to trust it

difficult_points: If 引导条件从句，提出 AI 造福人类的前提任务。
want AI to... 和 get people to... 都是不定式作宾补结构。
it 指 AI，说明问题核心是建立对 AI 的信任。

sentences.sentence: To do that, we need to understand why people are so reluctant to trust AI in the first place.
sentences.translation: 要做到这一点，我们需要先理解人们为什么一开始就如此不愿信任 AI。

structure.text: why people are so reluctant to trust AI in the first place

difficult_points: that 指前一句中让人们信任 AI 这件事。
why 引导宾语从句，作 understand 的宾语。
in the first place 强调要追问最初的根本原因。

sentences.sentence: Take the case of Watson for Oncology, one of technology giant IBM's supercomputer programs.
sentences.translation: 以 Watson for Oncology 为例，这是科技巨头 IBM 的超级计算机项目之一。

structure.text: the case of Watson for Oncology
one of technology giant IBM's supercomputer programs

difficult_points: Take the case of... 是引入例子的祈使结构。
one of... 是同位语，补充说明 Watson for Oncology 的身份。
technology giant IBM's 是所有格结构，表示该项目属于 IBM。

sentences.sentence: Their attempt to promote this program to cancer doctors was a PR disaster.
sentences.translation: 他们向癌症医生推广这一项目的尝试成了一场公关灾难。

structure.text: Their attempt to promote this program to cancer doctors
to promote this program to cancer doctors

difficult_points: Their 指 IBM 或该项目背后的推广方。
to promote... 修饰 attempt，说明尝试的内容。
PR disaster 表示公共关系层面的失败。

sentences.sentence: The AI promised to deliver top-quality recommendations on the treatment of 12 cancers that accounted for 80% of the world's cases.
sentences.translation: 该 AI 承诺会针对12种癌症的治疗提供最高质量的建议，而这12种癌症占全球病例的80%。

structure.text: that accounted for 80% of the world's cases

difficult_points: promised to deliver 表示该系统宣传中的承诺。
on the treatment of... 说明 recommendations 涉及的领域。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 12 cancers。

sentences.sentence: But when doctors first interacted with Watson, they found themselves in a rather difficult situation.
sentences.translation: 但是，当医生首次与 Watson 互动时，他们发现自己处于相当困难的境地。

structure.text: when doctors first interacted with Watson
found themselves in a rather difficult situation

difficult_points: But 表示宣传承诺与实际体验之间的转折。
when 引导时间状语从句，说明困难情境出现的时刻。
found themselves in... 表示发现自己处于某种境地。

sentences.sentence: On the one hand, if Watson provided guidance about a treatment that coincided with their own opinions, physicians did not see much point in Watson's recommendations.
sentences.translation: 一方面，如果 Watson 提供的治疗指导与医生自己的看法一致，医生就看不出 Watson 的建议有什么意义。

structure.text: if Watson provided guidance about a treatment that coincided with their own opinions
that coincided with their own opinions
did not see much point in Watson's recommendations

difficult_points: On the one hand 引出两难处境的第一种情况。
if 引导条件从句，条件是 AI 建议与医生意见一致。
that 引导定语从句，修饰 a treatment。
see much point in 表示认为某事有意义或价值。

sentences.sentence: The supercomputer was simply telling them what they already knew, and these recommendations did not change the actual treatment.
sentences.translation: 这台超级计算机只是在告诉他们已经知道的东西，而这些建议并没有改变实际治疗方案。

structure.text: was simply telling them what they already knew
and these recommendations did not change the actual treatment

difficult_points: was simply telling 强调 Watson 只是重复医生已知内容。
what 引导宾语从句，作 telling 的直接宾语。
and 后的并列分句说明这种建议没有实际治疗价值。

sentences.sentence: On the other hand, if Watson generated a recommendation that contradicted the experts' opinion, doctors would typically conclude that Watson wasn't competent.
sentences.translation: 另一方面，如果 Watson 生成的建议与专家意见相矛盾，医生通常会得出结论：Watson 并不胜任。

structure.text: if Watson generated a recommendation that contradicted the experts' opinion

difficult_points: On the other hand 引出两难处境的另一面。
that contradicted... 修饰 recommendation，表示建议与专家观点冲突。
would typically conclude 表示医生通常会形成这种判断。
wasn't competent 是医生对 Watson 能力的负面评价。

sentences.sentence: And the machine wouldn't be able to explain why its treatment was plausible because its machine-learning algorithms were simply too complex to be fully understood by humans.
sentences.translation: 而且机器无法解释为什么它的治疗方案是合理的，因为它的机器学习算法实在太复杂，人类无法完全理解。

structure.text: because its machine-learning algorithms were simply too complex to be fully understood by humans
to be fully understood by humans

difficult_points: wouldn't be able to 表示机器无法完成解释这一动作。
why 引导宾语从句，说明需要解释的内容。
because 引导原因从句，解释无法说明的根源在算法复杂。
too complex to be fully understood 是 too...to... 结构，表示复杂到无法被完全理解。

sentences.sentence: Consequently, this has caused even more suspicion and disbelief, leading many doctors to ignore the seemingly outlandish AI recommendations and stick to their own expertise.
sentences.translation: 因此，这引发了更多怀疑和不信任，导致许多医生忽视那些看似离奇的 AI 建议，并坚持自己的专业判断。

structure.text: has caused even more suspicion and disbelief
leading many doctors to ignore the seemingly outlandish AI recommendations and stick to their own expertise
to ignore the seemingly outlandish AI recommendations and stick to their own expertise

difficult_points: Consequently 表示前述解释困难导致的结果。
this 指 Watson 无法解释且建议可能违背专家意见的情况。
leading... 是现在分词短语，说明进一步结果。
ignore...and stick to... 是并列动作，说明医生的反应。

sentences.sentence: This is just one example of people's lack of confidence in AI and their reluctance to accept what AI has to offer.
sentences.translation: 这只是人们对 AI 缺乏信心、不愿接受 AI 所能提供之物的一个例子。

structure.text: of people's lack of confidence in AI and their reluctance to accept what AI has to offer

difficult_points: This 指前一段 Watson for Oncology 的案例。
lack of confidence 和 reluctance 并列说明人们对 AI 的态度。
what AI has to offer 是宾语从句，表示 AI 能提供的内容。

sentences.sentence: Trust in other people is often based on our understanding of how others think and having experience of their reliability.
sentences.translation: 对他人的信任通常建立在我们对他人思考方式的理解，以及对他们可靠性的经验之上。

structure.text: our understanding of how others think and having experience of their reliability

difficult_points: Trust in other people 是名词短语主语，核心是 Trust。
is based on 表示信任建立的基础。
understanding of... 和 having experience of... 并列作 based on 的宾语内容。

sentences.sentence: This helps create a psychological feeling of safety.
sentences.translation: 这有助于产生一种心理上的安全感。
difficult_points: This 指上一句中理解他人思维和有可靠性经验这两点。
helps create 表示促成某种心理感受。
of safety 后置说明 feeling 的内容。

sentences.sentence: AI, on the other hand, is still fairly new and unfamiliar to most people.
sentences.translation: 而另一方面，AI 对大多数人来说仍然相当新，也并不熟悉。

structure.text: is still fairly new and unfamiliar

difficult_points: on the other hand 将 AI 与人际信任作对比。
fairly new and unfamiliar 是并列表语，说明大多数人缺少熟悉感。
to most people 限定这种陌生感的对象范围。

sentences.sentence: Even if it can be technically explained (and that's not always the case), AI's decision-making process is usually too difficult for most people to comprehend.
sentences.translation: 即使它在技术上可以被解释（而且情况并不总是如此），AI 的决策过程通常也太难，大多数人无法理解。

structure.text: Even if it can be technically explained
and that's not always the case
is usually too difficult for most people to comprehend

difficult_points: Even if 引导让步从句，表示即便能解释也仍难理解。
括号中的 that's not always the case 补充说明 AI 并不总能被技术解释。
too difficult for most people to comprehend 是 too...for...to... 结构。
decision-making process 是复合名词，指 AI 作出决定的过程。

sentences.sentence: And interacting with something we don't understand can cause anxiety and give us a sense that we're losing control.
sentences.translation: 而且，与我们不了解的东西互动会引发焦虑，并让我们产生一种正在失去控制的感觉。

structure.text: And interacting with something we don't understand
can cause anxiety and give us a sense

difficult_points: interacting with... 是动名词短语作主语。
we don't understand 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 something。
cause anxiety 和 give us a sense 是并列谓语。
that we're losing control 解释 a sense 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Many people are also simply not familiar with many instances of AI actually working, because it often happens in the background.
sentences.translation: 许多人也只是并不熟悉 AI 实际发挥作用的许多案例，因为它常常是在后台发生的。

structure.text: are also simply not familiar with many instances of AI actually working
because it often happens in the background

difficult_points: not familiar with 表示缺乏接触或了解。
instances of AI actually working 指 AI 真正有效运作的具体案例。
because 引导原因从句，说明人们不了解这些案例的原因。
it 指 AI actually working 这种情况。

sentences.sentence: Instead, they are acutely aware of instances where AI goes wrong.
sentences.translation: 相反，他们对 AI 出错的案例格外敏感。
difficult_points: Instead 表示人们熟悉失败案例，而非成功案例。
acutely aware of 强调感知非常强烈。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 instances。

expressions.meaning_zh: 敏锐地意识到；非常清楚

sentences.sentence: Embarrassing AI failures receive a disproportionate amount of media attention, emphasising the message that we cannot rely on technology.
sentences.translation: 令人尴尬的 AI 失败获得了不成比例的大量媒体关注，从而强调了这样一种信息：我们不能依赖技术。

structure.text: receive a disproportionate amount of media attention
that we cannot rely on technology

difficult_points: disproportionate amount 表示关注量与实际代表性不相称。
emphasising... 是现在分词短语，说明媒体关注带来的结果。
that 引导同位语从句，解释 the message 的内容。

sentences.sentence: Machine learning is not foolproof, in part because the humans who design it aren't.
sentences.translation: 机器学习并非万无一失，部分原因是设计它的人类也并非万无一失。

structure.text: in part because the humans who design it aren't

difficult_points: foolproof 表示不会出错的，not foolproof 即并非万无一失。
in part because 表示这只是部分原因。
aren't 后省略 foolproof，形成省略结构。
who design it 修饰 the humans，it 指 machine learning。

sentences.sentence: Feelings about AI run deep.
sentences.translation: 人们对 AI 的感受根深蒂固。
difficult_points: run deep 是习语，表示情绪或态度深厚且不易改变。
about AI 后置修饰 Feelings，限定感受对象。

sentences.sentence: In a recent experiment, people from a range of backgrounds were given various sci-fi films about AI to watch and then asked questions about automation in everyday life.
sentences.translation: 在最近的一项实验中，来自不同背景的人被安排观看各种关于 AI 的科幻电影，然后被问及日常生活中的自动化问题。

structure.text: people from a range of backgrounds
were given various sci-fi films about AI to watch
and then asked questions about automation in everyday life

difficult_points: were given 和 asked 是并列被动谓语，描述实验安排。
from a range of backgrounds 修饰 people，表示参与者背景多样。
to watch 是不定式，说明 films 被给予的用途。
then 标记观看电影后进行提问。

sentences.sentence: It was found that, regardless of whether the film they watched depicted AI in a positive or negative light, simply watching a cinematic vision of our technological future polarised the participants' attitudes.
sentences.translation: 研究发现，无论他们观看的电影是以正面还是负面的角度描绘 AI，仅仅观看一种关于我们技术未来的电影化愿景，就会使参与者的态度两极化。

structure.text: that, regardless of whether the film they watched depicted AI in a positive or negative light, simply watching a cinematic vision of our technological future polarised the participants' attitudes
regardless of whether the film they watched depicted AI in a positive or negative light
simply watching a cinematic vision of our technological future

difficult_points: It was found 是被动报告结构，真正发现内容在 that 从句中。
regardless of whether... 表示不管电影对 AI 的描绘正面还是负面。
they watched 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 the film。
simply watching... 是 that 从句中的主语。

expressions.text: in a positive or negative light

sentences.sentence: Optimists became more extreme in their enthusiasm for AI and sceptics became even more guarded.
sentences.translation: 乐观者对 AI 的热情变得更极端，而怀疑者变得更加谨慎防备。

structure.text: became more extreme in their enthusiasm for AI
and sceptics became even more guarded

difficult_points: Optimists 和 sceptics 形成两类态度人群的对比。
became more extreme 与 became even more guarded 并列，说明两极化结果。
in their enthusiasm for AI 限定 more extreme 的具体方面。

sentences.sentence: This suggests people use relevant evidence about AI in a biased manner to support their existing attitudes, a deep-rooted human tendency known as “confirmation bias”.
sentences.translation: 这表明，人们会以有偏见的方式使用有关 AI 的相关证据来支持自己已有的态度，这是一种被称为“确认偏误”的根深蒂固的人类倾向。

structure.text: people use relevant evidence about AI in a biased manner to support their existing attitudes
a deep-rooted human tendency known as “confirmation bias”

difficult_points: This 指前一句实验中乐观者和怀疑者都更加极端的结果。
suggests 后省略 that，引出结论性从句。
in a biased manner 说明人们使用证据的方式带有偏见。
a deep-rooted human tendency 是同位语，概括前面整种心理现象。

sentences.sentence: As AI is represented more and more in media and entertainment, it could lead to a society split between those who benefit from AI and those who reject it.
sentences.translation: 随着 AI 越来越多地出现在媒体和娱乐中，它可能导致社会分裂为受益于 AI 的人和拒绝 AI 的人。

structure.text: As AI is represented more and more in media and entertainment
could lead to a society split between those who benefit from AI and those who reject it

difficult_points: As 引导时间/伴随状语从句，表示随着 AI 媒体形象增多。
it 指 AI being represented more and more 这一趋势。
split between...and... 后置修饰 society，说明社会分裂的两类人群。
those who... 表示“那些……的人”。

sentences.sentence: More pertinently, refusing to accept the advantages offered by AI could place a large group of people at a serious disadvantage.
sentences.translation: 更切题的是，拒绝接受 AI 所提供的优势，可能会使一大群人处于严重不利地位。

structure.text: refusing to accept the advantages offered by AI
could place a large group of people at a serious disadvantage

difficult_points: More pertinently 表示作者转向更相关、更直接的后果。
refusing to accept... 是动名词短语作主语。
offered by AI 是过去分词短语，修饰 advantages。
place...at a disadvantage 表示使某人处于不利位置。

sentences.sentence: Fortunately, we already have some ideas about how to improve trust in AI.
sentences.translation: 幸运的是，我们已经有了一些关于如何提升对 AI 信任的想法。

structure.text: about how to improve trust in AI

difficult_points: Fortunately 标记文章从问题转向解决方案。
about how to improve... 后置修饰 ideas，说明想法的内容。
trust in AI 表示对 AI 的信任。

sentences.sentence: Simply having previous experience with AI can significantly improve people's opinions about the technology, as was found in the study mentioned above.
sentences.translation: 仅仅拥有与 AI 接触的先前经验，就能显著改善人们对这项技术的看法，正如上文提到的研究所发现的那样。

structure.text: Simply having previous experience with AI
can significantly improve people's opinions about the technology
as was found in the study mentioned above

difficult_points: Simply having... 是动名词短语作主语。
significantly improve 表示改善幅度显著。
as was found... 引用前文研究作为依据。
mentioned above 后置修饰 the study。

sentences.sentence: Evidence also suggests the more you use other technologies such as the internet, the more you trust them.
sentences.translation: 证据还表明，你越多使用互联网等其他技术，就越信任它们。

structure.text: the more you use other technologies such as the internet, the more you trust them

difficult_points: suggests 后省略 that，引出证据表明的内容。
the more..., the more... 是比较相关结构，表示越……越……。
them 指 other technologies，而不是单指 internet。

sentences.sentence: Another solution may be to reveal more about the algorithms which AI uses and the purposes they serve.
sentences.translation: 另一个解决办法可能是更多揭示 AI 所使用的算法以及这些算法服务的目的。

structure.text: about the algorithms which AI uses and the purposes they serve

difficult_points: may be 表示这是一种可能的解决方案。
to reveal more 是表语不定式，说明 solution 的内容。
which AI uses 修饰 algorithms。
they serve 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 purposes。

sentences.sentence: Several high-profile social media companies and online marketplaces already release transparency reports about government requests and surveillance disclosures.
sentences.translation: 几家备受关注的社交媒体公司和在线市场已经发布关于政府请求和监控披露的透明度报告。

structure.text: Several high-profile social media companies and online marketplaces
about government requests and surveillance disclosures

difficult_points: Several high-profile... 是复合主语，包含公司和平台两类机构。
already release 表明这种透明度实践已有先例。
about... 后置说明 transparency reports 的内容。

sentences.sentence: A similar practice for AI could help people have a better understanding of the way algorithmic decisions are made.
sentences.translation: 针对 AI 的类似做法可以帮助人们更好地理解算法决策是如何作出的。

structure.text: could help people have a better understanding
of the way algorithmic decisions are made

difficult_points: A similar practice 指前一句发布透明度报告这一做法。
could help 表示可能带来的效果。
the way 后省略关系词，algorithmic decisions are made 说明决策形成方式。
are made 是被动语态，强调算法决策被作出。

sentences.sentence: Research suggests that allowing people some control over AI decision-making could also improve trust and enable AI to learn from human experience.
sentences.translation: 研究表明，让人们对 AI 决策拥有一定控制权，也可能提升信任，并使 AI 能够从人类经验中学习。

structure.text: that allowing people some control over AI decision-making could also improve trust and enable AI to learn from human experience
allowing people some control over AI decision-making
improve trust and enable AI to learn from human experience

difficult_points: suggests 后接 that 宾语从句，说明研究结论。
allowing... 是动名词短语，作 that 从句的主语。
could improve 和 enable 并列，说明给人控制权的两个可能效果。
learn from human experience 表示 AI 可从人的经验中改进。

sentences.sentence: For example, one study showed that when people were allowed the freedom to slightly modify an algorithm, they felt more satisfied with its decisions, more likely to believe it was superior and more likely to use it in the future.
sentences.translation: 例如，一项研究显示，当人们被允许有自由稍微修改一个算法时，他们对它的决定更满意，更可能相信它更优越，也更可能在未来使用它。

structure.text: that when people were allowed the freedom to slightly modify an algorithm, they felt more satisfied with its decisions, more likely to believe it was superior and more likely to use it in the future
when people were allowed the freedom to slightly modify an algorithm
more likely to believe it was superior and more likely to use it in the future

difficult_points: showed 后接 that 宾语从句，说明研究发现。
when 从句表示人们获得修改算法自由这一条件。
were allowed the freedom to... 是被动结构，表示被给予做某事的自由。
more satisfied、more likely to believe、more likely to use 是并列结果。

sentences.sentence: We don't need to understand the intricate inner workings of AI systems, but if people are given a degree of responsibility for how they are implemented, they will be more willing to accept AI into their lives.
sentences.translation: 我们不需要理解 AI 系统复杂的内部运作方式，但如果人们被赋予对其实施方式的一定责任，他们就会更愿意接受 AI 进入自己的生活。

structure.text: don't need to understand the intricate inner workings of AI systems
but if people are given a degree of responsibility for how they are implemented
they will be more willing to accept AI into their lives

difficult_points: don't need to understand 与后半句形成对比，说明信任不要求完全理解内部机制。
if 引导条件从句，条件是人们获得一定责任。
how they are implemented 是介词 for 的宾语从句，they 指 AI systems。
be more willing to 表示接受 AI 的意愿增强。
